message:
fix(http/h2): add pending operations flood guard against CVE-2019-9512/9515

Add a hard cap of 10,000 pending operations in the HTTP/2 connection
frame processing path. When a client floods the server with PING or
SETTINGS frames faster than they can be processed, the pending_ops
queue grows without bound, causing memory exhaustion (as described in
CVE-2019-9512 rapid reset and CVE-2019-9515 settings flood).

When the threshold is exceeded, return an H2 ENHANCE_YOUR_CALM error
to close the connection, preventing unbounded memory growth from
malicious or misbehaving clients.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
